svg.title: HIDProxBox Enclosure — Option C: Control Deck
svg.text: Thin angled control surface · 220 × 120 × 22 mm · All controls on top face
22 mm height = tight for Pi + USB hub
Pro: sleekest look, minimal desk space,
all controls right in front of user
Con: 22 mm is very tight — may need
custom Pi Zero 2 W or Pi CM4 build
